who: healthcare administrators in medical clinics processing 50-100 patient records/month
offer: For healthcare administrators in medical clinics processing 50-100 patient records/month, inefficient record management causes delayed compliance reporting. We automate record aggregation instead of manual compilation of patient records and reports.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports from scattered patient records.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for healthcare administrators
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to healthcare administrators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for patient records
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing patient data
